summary: The founder of the Dragons, Elric, is found by a demon king who has been searching for him for over a thousand years. Elric is unconscious and has been taken in by the demon king's soldiers, but he soon regains consciousness and clashes with his captor. Meanwhile, another character, Brian, is harassed by a group of villagers and soldiers from House Tworq.
key_moments: The founder of the Dragons, Elric, is found after a thousand years
Elric clashes with his captor, a demon king
Brian is harassed by a group of villagers and soldiers
